English: A collection of building shapes made from reinforced brass. Highly durable, dense, and resistant.
An industrial-grade hydraulic press. Highly efficient for mass-producing ammunition casings, weapon parts, and heavy armor plates. Requires raw materials.
Internal steam pressure is accumulating. Release it with a heavy attack!
Melted and forged brass, hardened for industrial applications and heavy ammunition.
A heavy-duty ammunition casing stamped in a mechanical press. Withstands higher pressure and packs a bigger punch!
A thick, heavy armor plate stamped from forged brass. Just like the romans used to make!
A broken hydraulic ram salvaged from an old press. With a little forged steel and ingenuity, it could be repurposed into something devastating.
Just like garrysmod! Custom laser not included...
A monstrous sledgehammer retrofitted with a salvaged hydraulic ram. Holding down the heavy attack charges steam pressure; releasing it unleashes a massive kinetic shockwave.
A high-tech device that allows instant travel to your bedroll. Teleport time scales with item quality (30s at T1, 15s at T6). Recharge with Flux Cells...
A high-tech device that allows instant travel to any waypoint/bedroll and also through time! Teleport time scales with item quality (30s at T1, 15s at T6). Recharge with Flux Cells...
Plant these seeds in a Farm Plot to cultivate highly reactive, glowing Flux Crops.
A mature, energy-dense plant that hums with static charge. Harvest to extract Flux Fibres.
Raw, static-charged crop fibers harvested from matured Flux Plants. Can be processed into refined Flux.
A highly concentrated elemental fluid extracted from raw Flux Fibres. Essential for high-tech item fabrication and charging batteries.
How the fuck do batteries even work?
